Meta.title: NextDoor Pros — Trusted local services across Canada
Meta.description: Book vetted local pros for home, beauty, outdoor, moving, seasonal, and handyman jobs in your Canadian city.

hero.title: Local services, done right — in your Canadian city.
hero.subtitle: Pick your city to see verified pros available in your area. Home care, beauty, moving, and more.
hero.imageAlt: Two friendly tradespeople smiling on the job site

Home.featuredSubtitle: Browse the categories our customers book most.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Body: Choose your Canadian city so we can match you with pros in your area.
howItWorks.step2Body: Browse categories or describe what you need — we'll narrow it down.
howItWorks.step3Body: Compare ratings, lock in a time, and pay securely after the job is done.

Partners.title: Our partners
Partners.lead: We team up with trusted businesses to bring our community more — better service, wider reach, and more value at your door.
Partners.intro: The organisations we work alongside to serve you better.

Services.title: Services
Services.subtitle: Everything you need, from one trusted source.

home.title: Home services
home.description: Cleaning, painting, plumbing, electrical, appliance repair.

beauty.title: Beauty services
beauty.description: Mobile hair, makeup, nails, lashes, and esthetics at your door.

outdoor.title: Outdoor services
outdoor.description: Lawn care, gardening, pressure washing, deck and fence work.

moving.title: Moving support
moving.description: Local movers, packing help, junk removal, and furniture assembly.

seasonal.title: Seasonal services
seasonal.description: Snow removal, eavestrough cleaning, holiday lights, AC tune-ups.

handyman.title: Small handyman jobs
handyman.description: Mounting, sealing, drywall patches, fixture swaps, and quick fixes.

wellness.title: Wellness
wellness.description: Mobile massage, physiotherapy, personal training, and in-home wellness visits.

flooring.title: Flooring & carpeting
flooring.description: Hardwood, laminate, vinyl plank, and tile installation — plus carpet cleaning and repair.

painting.title: Painting
painting.description: Interior and exterior painting, accent walls, trim, and full-room refreshes.

carwash.title: Car wash & detailing
carwash.description: Mobile hand wash, interior shampoo, waxing, and full detail at your door.

catering.title: Catering
catering.description: Event catering, private chefs, drop-off platters, and party food at your door.

insurance.title: Insurance
insurance.description: Auto, home, renters, and life insurance — quotes and coverage from local agents and brokers.

carrepair.title: Car repair
carrepair.description: Mechanics for brakes, oil changes, diagnostics, tires, and bodywork — mobile or in-shop.

shoesclothes.title: Shoes & clothing
shoesclothes.description: Buy, sell, and tailor shoes and clothing — alterations, repairs, and local resellers.

rental.title: Apartment & room rental
rental.description: Apartments, rooms, and shared housing for rent — short and long term, from local hosts.

windowtinting.title: Window tinting
windowtinting.description: Car and home window tinting — UV and heat reduction, privacy film, and ceramic coatings.

carpool.title: Carpool & rides
carpool.description: Share rides and split the cost — daily commutes, airport runs, and intercity carpooling.

shipping.title: Shipping
shipping.description: Shipping goods from Cameroon to Canada and Canada to Cameroon.

groceries.title: Groceries
groceries.description: Cameroonian spices and foods — barbecue spice mix, fresh ndolé, fresh eru, and more, delivered locally.

decoration.title: Art decoration
decoration.description: Sculptures, African wood carvings, decorative boards, and African picture frames to style your home.

tech.title: Tech & software
tech.description: Custom web and mobile apps, websites, IT support, cloud setup, and software solutions from local developers.

listings.emptyHelp: Be the first — list your business and we'll send you the next customer in your area.

About.title: About NextDoor Pros
About.lead: We connect Canadians with reliable local service pros — no agency middlemen, no surprises.
About.ctaBody: Find a vetted pro in your city, or list your business and start getting hired.
About.missionBody: Hiring help in your neighborhood shouldn't be a coin flip. We verify every pro on our platform — background, insurance, and reviews — so you book with confidence in every Canadian city we serve.

values.localBody: Every pro lives and works in the city they serve.
values.fairBody: Transparent quotes — you see the price before you book.
values.trustBody: Background checks, insurance, and real customer reviews.

News.title: News & updates
News.subtitle: Product launches, new cities, and tips from our pros.

p1.title: Now live in Halifax and Quebec City
p1.excerpt: We're expanding east — book vetted pros in two more provinces this week.

p2.title: Spring 2026: seasonal services open for booking
p2.excerpt: Lawn care, deck refinishing, and outdoor cleanup pros are taking bookings now.

p3.title: What to expect from a verified NextDoor Pro
p3.excerpt: How we vet every pro on the platform — and why it matters.

Contact.subtitle: Questions, partnerships, or press — we're listening.
Contact.reachBody: Prefer to talk it through? Use any of the channels below — or drop us a message and we'll get back to you fast.

Contact.ctaBody: Browse trusted local services in your city, or list your business and start getting hired.

form.name: Your name

Pricing.title: Simple pricing for local pros.
Pricing.subtitle: Get found by customers in your city and respond to job posts. Pick monthly or save with annual.
Pricing.disclaimer: Prices in CAD. Taxes calculated at checkout. Cancel anytime.

features.listing: Public business listing in your service city
features.jobs: Browse and respond to every job post

annual.name: Annual Pro
annual.tagline: Best for pros who book regularly.

Jobs.title: Jobs posted near you
Jobs.subtitle: Browse what neighbours need done — or post your own. Anyone interested reaches out directly.
Jobs.emptyInCity: No open jobs in {city} right now.
Jobs.emptyHelp: Be the first to post one — it takes about 30 seconds.
Jobs.myJobsEmpty: You haven't posted a job yet.
Jobs.myJobsEmptyHelp: Post one and we'll show it to interested folks in your area.
Jobs.notFound: Job not found — it may have been removed.
Jobs.contactHelp: Contact the poster using the buttons below.
Jobs.confirmClose: Close this job so it no longer appears in the public list?
Jobs.confirmDelete: Delete this job? This cannot be undone.

paid.pendingNotice: Your job is waiting for payment. It will appear publicly once Stripe confirms the charge — usually within a few seconds.
paid.applySectionIntro: The budget is already paid into NextDoor Pros' escrow. If the customer picks you and marks the work complete, funds are released to your Stripe account.
paid.applySignIn: You need an account to apply.
paid.applyNeedsListing: Create your pro listing first so the customer can see who they're hiring.
paid.applyNeedsStripe: Finish Stripe onboarding so we can pay you when the job's done.
paid.applyMessagePlaceholder: Briefly explain why you're a great fit.
paid.youWereSelected: You've been selected for this job
paid.youWereSelectedBody: Reach out to the customer using the contact info they shared. Funds will be released to your Stripe account when they mark the work complete.
paid.applicationRejected: The customer picked someone else for this job.
paid.applicationPending: Your application is in. The customer will get in touch if they want to hire you.
paid.confirmWithdraw: Withdraw your application from this job?
paid.noApplicants: No pros have applied yet. They'll show up here as soon as they do.
paid.confirmSelect: Select this pro? Other applicants will be notified you've picked someone.
paid.confirmComplete: Release the funds to the selected pro? This cannot be undone.
paid.markCompleteHint: Releases funds (budget minus 10% platform fee) to the pro's Stripe account.
paid.confirmCancel: Cancel this job and refund the full budget to your card?
paid.releasedBody: The pro was paid {amount} (your budget minus the 10% platform fee). Stripe will deposit it to their bank on their payout schedule.
paid.refundedBody: The full budget was returned to your original payment method. Allow a few business days to see it on your statement.

form.title: Post a job
form.subtitle: Tell us what you need. Anyone interested will contact you directly.
form.jobTitlePlaceholder: e.g. Paint our kitchen and dining room
form.descriptionPlaceholder: What needs doing, size of the job, any details a pro should know.
form.prePayLabel: Lock in my budget and pre-pay through NextDoor Pros
form.prePayHelp: Hold the funds in escrow. Pros know your budget is real. Release them to your chosen pro when the work is done. NextDoor Pros keeps a 10% platform fee.
form.budgetCadHelp: $5 minimum, $50,000 max. You're charged now — funds stay in escrow until you mark the job complete.
form.feeDisclosure: Secured by Stripe. We charge your card now and only release to the pro when you approve.
form.contactHelpPaid: We use this to send you the receipt and to share applicant updates.
form.errContactRequired: Add at least one way for people to reach you.
form.errEmailRequiredForPaid: Email is required when pre-paying so we can send the receipt.

Reviews.title: Reviews
Reviews.noneBody: No reviews yet — be the first to leave one.
Reviews.signInToReview: Sign in to leave a review
Reviews.ownListing: This is your listing — you can't review it.

ServiceCity.metaDescription: Find trusted, vetted {service} pros serving {city}, {province} — insured, reviewed, and ready to help. Compare local pros and book with confidence.
ServiceCity.intro: Looking for {service} in {city}? NextDoor Pros connects {city} homeowners and renters with vetted local pros — every {service} pro on the platform is identity-checked, insured, and reviewed by real customers across {province}. Compare quotes, read genuine reviews, and book the right pro with confidence — no agency middleman, no booking fees.
ServiceCity.q1: How do I hire a {service} pro in {city}?
ServiceCity.a1: Browse the verified {service} pros serving {city} above, check their reviews and pricing, then contact them directly through NextDoor Pros — there's no agency in the middle and no booking fee.
ServiceCity.q2: Are {service} pros in {city} verified and insured?
ServiceCity.a2: Yes. Every pro listed on NextDoor Pros is identity-checked and carries insurance, and the reviews you see come from real, completed jobs in {city} and across {province}.
ServiceCity.a3: It depends on the size and scope of the job, but you'll always see a transparent quote from each {city} pro before you book — no surprises when the work is done.
ServiceCity.q4: Do you cover other cities in {province}?
ServiceCity.a4: Yes — NextDoor Pros serves {city} and many other communities across {province}. If a pro isn't available in your exact neighbourhood, we'll help you find one nearby.
ServiceCity.proCtaBody: List your business free and get found by customers looking for {service} in {city}.

WhatsApp.label: Chat on WhatsApp
WhatsApp.prefill: Hi NextDoor Pros — I have a question.
WhatsApp.headerSubtitle: We usually reply within a few hours
WhatsApp.greeting: 👋 Hi! How can we help today?
WhatsApp.quickHireMsg: Hi NextDoor Pros — I'm looking for a local pro. Can you help?
WhatsApp.quickJobMsg: Hi NextDoor Pros — I'd like to post a job. How does it work?

signIn.title: Welcome back
signIn.subtitle: Sign in with a magic link — no password needed.

Auth.errInvalidCredentials: Incorrect email or password. Try again.
Auth.brand3: Free to browse services and post jobs

dashboard.title: Your dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your listing and how customers reach you.
dashboard.noListingTitle: You don't have a listing yet
dashboard.noListingBody: Add your business so customers in your city can find you.
dashboard.publishedHelp: Customers in your city can see your listing.
dashboard.draftHelp: Your listing is private until you publish it.

photos.title: Product photos
photos.help: Show customers your work — add up to 8 photos.
photos.empty: No photos yet — upload some to show off your work.
photos.max: You've reached the maximum of 8 photos.
photos.failed: Couldn't upload that — please try again.

membership.title: Pro membership
membership.intro: Your pro membership keeps your listing visible and lets you accept jobs and bookings on NextDoor Pros.
membership.statusActiveBody: Thanks for being a Pro member. Manage your billing in the Stripe portal.
membership.statusPastDueTitle: Payment failed — please update your card
membership.statusPastDueBody: Stripe couldn't charge your card this cycle. Update it in the portal before access is paused.
membership.statusCancelledBody: Your membership has been cancelled. Re-subscribe any time to bring your listing back.
membership.statusNoneBody: Pick monthly or annual to start accepting jobs and bookings on the platform.
membership.statusIncompleteBody: We're waiting for Stripe to confirm. If you closed the Checkout page, click below to try again.

payments.title: Payments
payments.intro: Get paid through NextDoor Pros — customers pay you on the site and Stripe deposits the funds in your bank account.
payments.statusNotStartedTitle: Payments are not set up yet
payments.statusNotStartedBody: Connect Stripe to start accepting payments from customers.
payments.statusInProgressBody: Finish entering your business and bank details on Stripe to enable payouts.
payments.statusActiveBody: You can list priced services below. Customers will pay through Stripe and you'll receive payouts automatically.
payments.noContractor: Create your listing first, then come back here to set up payments.
payments.servicesIntro: Each entry becomes a Book button on your public profile. NextDoor Pros keeps a 10% platform fee.
payments.servicesEmpty: No priced services yet. Add one to let customers book and pay you online.
payments.priceHint: Between $1 and $50,000. Customer pays this amount; we deduct a 10% fee and pay you the rest via Stripe.
payments.removeConfirm: Remove this service? Customers won't be able to book it anymore.
payments.saveError: Couldn't save — check the price and try again.
payments.feeNote: You need to finish Stripe onboarding before you can add priced services.

profile.contactPrivacyNote: You'll connect through secure in-app messaging — no phone number or email is shared.

booking.sectionIntro: Pay securely through NextDoor Pros — funds go to the pro after the booking is confirmed.
booking.notePlaceholder: Date / time / address — anything they should know.
booking.feeDisclosure: Secured by Stripe. NextDoor Pros keeps a 10% platform fee.

membershipPicker.title: One last step — pick your plan
membershipPicker.subtitle: Pros pay a small membership fee to keep their listing live and accept jobs and bookings on the platform.
membershipPicker.feature1: Public listing in your service city
membershipPicker.feature2: Apply to jobs and accept paid bookings
membershipPicker.feature3: Customer payments handled by Stripe (we keep 10% per transaction)
membershipPicker.feature4: Cancel any time from the Stripe customer portal
membershipPicker.alreadyActiveBody: Your pro membership is active. Manage billing from the dashboard.
membershipPicker.noListingBody: We need your business details before activating membership.
membershipPicker.cancelledNotice: Checkout was cancelled — pick a plan to try again.

onboard.subtitle: A few details so customers can find and reach you.
onboard.descriptionPlaceholder: What you do, years of experience, what makes you stand out.
onboard.contactHelp: Provide at least one. Customers will see and contact you directly.
onboard.startingAtHelp: Shown to customers as "Starting at $X" on your listing. Optional — leave blank if you prefer to quote per job.
onboard.publishHelp: Uncheck to keep your listing private while you edit it.
onboard.errStartingAtInvalid: Starting price must be between $0 and $50,000.
onboard.errServicesRequired: Select at least one service category.
onboard.errContactRequired: Add at least one way customers can reach you.

success.successBody: Thanks — your payment went through. You'll receive a receipt by email, and the pro will be in touch shortly.
success.pendingBody: Stripe is finalising the transaction. You'll receive a receipt by email in a moment.
success.missingBody: If you just paid, give it a few seconds and refresh — otherwise the link may be expired or for a different account.

Messages.title: Messages
Messages.subtitle: Your conversations with customers.
Messages.guestSubtitle: Chat with the pro — no account needed. Keep this page's link to come back.
Messages.modalIntro: Send a message — no account needed. We'll email you a private link to see the pro's reply.
Messages.redactionNotice: Phone numbers, emails and links are removed automatically. Keep conversations and payments on NextDoor Pros.
Messages.errEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
Messages.errGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Messages.emptyHint: When a customer messages you, their conversation appears here.
Messages.selectPrompt: Select a conversation to start chatting.
Messages.guestLinkNotice: Bookmark this page or use the link we emailed you.
Messages.invalidLink: This conversation link is invalid or has expired. Open the pro's profile to start a new message.
Messages.signInTitle: Sign in to view your messages
Messages.signInBody: Your customer conversations live in your pro account.
Messages.unavailable: Messaging is not available right now.
Messages.saveLinkBody: Save this private link to return to the conversation.
